feed.title: AO3 - Jason Todd/Reader (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Jason Todd/Reader on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The House hunger built
entry.summary:
Author: FearTheHime

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 149,966Chapters: 31/?Kudos: 868

Summary: "Of course I eat people, I mean...It's not something I would broadcast since it's...well Gotham and they began to make a phad about it because the citizens are brilliantly...stupid."Bodies are piling up, whatever is left. Families; different backgrounds, different ethnics, religions, looks are being eaten and whatever is left into a master piece. Some sort of art with the remains and everyone was losing time and leads to find out who has been feasting upon Gotham citizens. Jason however, knew of a Cannibal that he totally never mentioned to Bruce. It's not Jason's fault he died before revealing his darkest discovery and that discovery is in the form of a boy he had left behind. [M/N] [L/N]; Mortitan, brilliant, a chef of his own making and conisear of flesh.All Jason needed to do is sweeten the deal in a way that drives all people, after all at the end of the day {M/N] is human after all."Besides..it's people...they are literally born every day..so who cares if a few of them...just disapear once in a while?"

entry.title: A Heart for a Heart
entry.summary:
Author: Angelina_2206

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,239Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 16

Summary: Jason Todd was willing to trade anything to save Gotham. His blood, life, soul. His heart. He just didn't expect to fall in love with the goddess who took them. Years later, he's a king, and you start to fade. And the only way to save her is to give back everything she poured into him, even if it kills him. Jason x Goddess Reader. No use of Y/N (Jason todd could be OOC)

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Underground
entry.summary:
Author: lulustars28

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,585Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 18

Summary: There is one name in Gotham's underground fighting circuit that strikes fear in all fighters: "Red Hood".Jason Todd is Roman Sionis golden fighter, who has made him millions. To Roman, Jason is nothing more than property and profit. The only reason Jason is Roman's lapdog is to win money to put food on the table for him and his younger brother, Tim. The money is never enough, but it keeps them alive. Walking away has never been an option. Because years ago, Jason made a promise to someone who never came back. A girl he met in stolen moments between worlds—someone who made him believe, briefly, that Gotham didn’t have to be loneliness and survival. Someone who promised she wouldn’t disappear like everyone else. Then she did. No goodbye. No explanation. No way to find her again. Jason buried the memory the only way he knew how: by assuming she had chosen to forget him. Now she’s back. After six years abroad, Roman Sionis’s daughter has finally returned to Gotham. Jason sees her as a traitor due to her broken promises. She sees him as another one of her father's thugs. But how long can their past stay buried under contempt, and how long can it be before old feelings begin to rise to the surface?

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: The City of Black and White Turned Red
entry.summary:
Author: blessingsblessing

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,132Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 9

Summary: This is a story that follows a military brat turned detective in one of the most dangerous, disfunctional cities in the world. One day she is met with a new case, a drug bust gone wrong. There's more than meets the eye. A dangerous anti-hero? New high tech drugs? Drug wars? Her normal crazy was going to get a lot crazier as she finds herself right in the middle of the most dangerous, world changing case in the city. Will be following the arc of Arkham Knight and Under the Red Hood. Drugs, power, and death.

entry.title: As You Wish
entry.summary:
Author: MacbethsDagger

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,849Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 6

Summary: Five years after the death of your dear farm boy, Jason, you are to be wed to Alexander Elliot, prince of Gotham. As your wedding day approaches, you are kidnapped and become involved in a complicated plot to start a war between Gotham and Metropolis. However, one person seems to keep throwing a wrench into these plans, the infamous Red Hood. As you are unwillingly used as a political pawn, you find yourself both drawn to and deeply irritated by this mysterious yet familiar figure. (I'm bad at intros)

entry.summary:
Author: liasnotepad

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,884Chapters: 16/16Kudos: 52

Summary: You work at a bookstore, and your boss is an addicted. Red Hood saves you a couple of times, and finally gives in to giving you his...email (?).Meanwhile, a new bookstore is being build right next to yours. Inspired by the You've Got Mail movie.

entry.title: Motion to Dismiss (My Feelings)
entry.summary:
Author: CrazyFandomer

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,167Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 7

Summary: I had exactly two goals that morning:1. Get the hearing postponed2. Keep my client from losing everythingFalling in love with opposing counsel was not on the list.And neither was everything else that came with falling in love with said opposing counsel (which was a LOT).

entry.title: Big Time Sensuality
entry.summary:
Author: oceanicbliss (renx)

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,987Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 1

Summary: Watching your planet and supposedly everyone you love die...not so fun. Discovering your best friend and her baby cousin are alive on a boiling hot planet with an odd yellow sun...very confusing. Being forced to become friends with this bright red and green kid with what is easily the ugliest outfit you've ever seen...super duper annoying. This planet is so weird.

entry.title: Muscle Memory
entry.summary:
Author: r_u_lost_bby_g0rl

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,011Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 12

Summary: For the past three years, you’d constantly wondered why you hadn’t died too. Your parent's death hit you hard and getting kidnapped by a Gotham City goon hit harder. After Red Hood saves you, your life takes an unexpected turn full of research, cleaning up wounds, chemistry, and trying to talk with unadjusted millionaires. As the two of you fall in love, Scarecrow's plan to achieve complete control over the citizens of Gotham looms over the fate of your relationship. Uncertainty becomes a constant in your life, and, apparently, so do the ears of the nosy Wayne family.

entry.title: Over His Dead Body
entry.summary:
Author: Jamrockdrops

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 78,378Chapters: 25/?Kudos: 1,024

Summary: 15 years ago you met Jason Todd. 7 years ago he died. Finally, you've returned to Gotham ready to move on with your life and succeed in your new job at Wayne Tech. One day you get attacked and are saved by the infamous Red Hood, but he knows things about you he shouldn't and it seems like he's always watching you and always knows where you are.(No use of Y/N L/N, The Rape/non-consent tag is because it's mentioned (once) and the reader is attacked but it's stopped before anything gets too serious but I wanted to make sure no one accidentally got triggered)

entry.summary:

entry.title: Oil Stained Marginalia
entry.summary:
Author: laymorphosis

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,792Chapters: 2/20Kudos: 50

Summary: Jason Todd owns the mechanic shop down the street from a sleepy used bookstore that almost never sees a customer; which means the girl behind the counter has more than enough time on her hands to reorganize shelves, read and reread donated books too battered to put on the shelves, drink way too much coffee, and pretend she isn't watching the broad-shouldered mechanic who keeps making new excuses to come in during his lunch breaks.

entry.title: together, forever
entry.summary:
Author: peachmiffy

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,992Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 21

Summary: You’re nine years old. You color with abandoned, half-dried dollar store Bic pens with ink that bubbles at the tip and occasionally bursts. Jason Todd is ten years old, and he sits beside you as he makes his way through his library stack of novels. This year, he’ll be turning eleven, which means he’ll move on to junior high and you’ll be left behind like a baby. He’s the best friend you’ve ever had. You’ve never known a life without him.    OR: After your mom dies, Catwoman takes you in. It changes you forever. You know what they say about cats and nine lives, don't you?

entry.title: everything we were [Jason Todd/Reader]
entry.summary:
Author: catzuuuu

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 602Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 5

Summary: After losing her parents in a car crash, [Name] is taken in under Bruce Wayne’s guardianship and slowly becomes part of the Wayne family and part of Jason Todd’s world. Jason is the first person in Gotham who feels real to her. And she is the only person who ever feels like home to him. Somewhere between late nights, training and stolen moments of normalcy, they fall in love. But Gotham doesn’t let things stay soft for long. When Jason dies, everything breaks. Grief pushes [Name] out of Wayne Manor and into the hands of the League of Assassins. Under Talia al Ghul, she is reshaped into something else entirely, Shadow, a controlled weapon moving through Gotham’s darkness. Years later, Red Hood returns to Gotham. And neither of them realize at first that they are chasing the ghost of the same past.
